text.message: ah its just dead in my hand unfortunately
My games over with a 7 haha
you gotta get some settles down lol
I just never have the cards I need
yea you got a lot of wheat lol
Plowing not my thing but I need settle spots
i was surprised bc you need all the settles lol
I almost had 9 4 11 but u gave oj a sheep trade just in time for him to settle
Man that trade would’ve only given me a dev
Blue can I get a sheep
Might not be wheat but hope so
Blue I need a dev here
And I help you with road
I moved it off and you made a deal
I said whatever I steal, might not be wheat
If it comes down to it I’m not helping you out
but i really dont understand the solo on OJ
im asking you why you solo'd OJ
The plan was to get you road
I would have traded the wood
but why solo OJ lol i still dont understand
And after that you and orange would have been in the lead
And oj is my dev comp
OJ can actually take road lol
I don’t really mind as long as you don’t win honestly
If you let me pop that turn this would’ve have happened
I told you it would happen
Not really hindsight when I called it 10 orbits ago
He might still have to pull
Black you killed my road usage haha
That’s a sheep not a dev
Game would be over if you had road red
I need one card for a dev
I just said I have a yop
Orange has the win in hand my guy
